dr_register.DR10_v2: turnover_cost_explosion (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05) -> REJECT_FAST. AND-conjunction (78cd22e). Cash-equity cost_drag CLEARS strong margin

dr_register.DR5: cost_stress_turns_edge_negative tier flip -> REJECT_FAST / INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD carveout
dr_register.DR9: data_continuity_integrity_check (per-name) -> INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD. ALREADY PASSED all 3 (sealed a8ff9126...)

inherited_constraints_block_C6: REC1-equivalent (BINDING): OOS K9 reachable with improved margin vs all-tech (cross-sector higher signal independence ~75% vs all-tech ~60%; expected effective rate 45-79/y vs 50/y OOS floor). If observed effective IS rate falls below 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE per s10-d2/s12-d1 precedent. The chain shall NOT relax K9 at OOS.
DA3=B (BINDING): per-trade risk pct = 0.005 (0.5%); standard sizing (not nano); admissible under DR10 v2 for cash equity
DA4=B (BINDING): START_CASH_USD = 100000 ($100k); DR10 v2 cost_drag clears strong margin at $100k for cash equity
K9-reachability discipline applied at PLAN+DRAFT+SEAL; binding for all subsequent phases
